---
title: Analysis of air quality within a street canyon using statistical and dispersion modelling techniques
date: '2007-01-01'
author:
- E.J. Westmoreland
- N. Carslaw
- D.C. Carslaw
- A. Gillah
- E. Bates
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Atmospheric Environment*'
---

## Analysis of air quality within a street canyon using statistical and dispersion modelling techniques

<p class="pub-meta">E.J. Westmoreland, N. Carslaw, D.C. Carslaw, A. Gillah, E. Bates</p>

_*Atmospheric Environment*_, 2007


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2007.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
